name: Thunder Dash
description: Deliver an electric shock to an opponent using a special gadget hidden in C. Viper's gloves. The strength of the input will determine the angle and distance traveled.

name: Tracer Combination
description: A follow-up attack performed from regular Thunder Dash.

name: Feint
description: A technique that cancels Thunder Dash before it can be fully performed.

name: Burning Kick
description: Scorch the opponent with a flaming kick using a special gadget hidden in C. Viper's shoes. Useful for controlling space, surprising your opponent, or for use in combos.

name: Knuckled Pursuit
description: A follow-up attack performed from Burning Kick.

name: Double Burn
description: A follow-up attack performed from Burning Kick that allows you to move before your opponent even when blocked.

name: Aerial Burning Kick
description: A Burning Kick performed in the air. Useful for using the momentum of your jump to launch an offensive.

name: Seismic Hammer
description: Send shock waves through the ground using a gadget hidden in C. Viper's gloves. Useful for controlling space and in combos, it can also be canceled using a High Jump.

name: Feint
description: A technique that cancels Seismic Hammer before it can be fully performed.

name: Focus Force
description: Produce a protective barrier in front of you. Absorb an opponent's strike attack, or release the button to perform the attack. It can be canceled while held with a forward dash.

name: Limit Decoupler
description: Push C. Viper's heels to near overload before attacking. You can perform High Jumps or special attack follow-ups for a short time after this without using Drive Gauge.

name: Mission Complete
description: An attack that makes full use of C. Viper's gadgets.  A highly versatile move, useful in combos or for turning the tables on your opponent.

name: Hard Luck Rejector
description: Lift your opponent high in the air before driving them into the ground. Useful in combos or for turning the tables on your opponent from short range.

name: Viper Elbow
description: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching.

name: Double Kick
description: A long-reaching attack that hits multiple times.

name: High Jump
description: Use Drive Gauge to perform a higher jump than normal. The beginning of High Jump can be canceled into special moves.

name: High Impulse
description: Grab your opponent and send them flying away using powerful shock waves. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Thunder Cradle
description: Grab your opponent and shock them with electricity. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.

name: Drive Impact: Viper Cannon
description: Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.

name: Drive Reversal: Counter Spark
description: Can be used after blocking an attack to quickly turn a defensive position into an offensive one. Can also be used when recovering from a knockdown. The input can be held while downed to perform this when rising.

name: Drive Parry
description: Adopt a stance that allows you to deflect all opponent strikes. This stance can be sustained by holding down the command used to activate it.

name: Parry Drive Rush
description: Immediately move forward from a Drive Parry stance. Normal or unique attacks performed while moving will have their properties changed.

name: Cancel Drive Rush
description: Immediately move forward out of an attack. Can be performed during any special-cancelable move.
